common.brand: Fuente de Vida Ministerio de Fuego
common.copyright: © 2026 Fountain of Life Fire Ministries Int'l (N.L.C)

hero.title: Experience a real encounter with God
hero.text: Discover our services, activities, and gatherings designed to inspire, heal, and renew your faith. Each image reflects the strength and unity of a modern spiritual family.

vision.text: En Fountain of Life Fire Ministries Int'l creemos en el poder transformador de la presencia de Dios. Somos una casa de adoración, restauración y avivamiento espiritual. Aquí vidas son renovadas, corazones son encendidos y destinos son restaurados. Levantamos una generación llena de fe, propósito y pasión por Cristo. Este es un lugar donde la fuente de vida nunca deja de fluir.

welcome.title: New Here?
welcome.text: We would love to meet you, walk with you, and help you take your first steps into this family of faith.

testimonyCard.title: Faith Testimonials
testimonyCard.text: Discover real stories of healing, restoration, and miracles God has done in our congregation.

upcomingCard.title: Upcoming Programs
upcomingCard.text: Discover the next programs and activities of our community to join and grow in faith.

branchCard.title: Find a Branch
branchCard.text: Locate the nearest branch and join us in person for our services, meetings and spiritual activities.

conocenos.heroText: We are a spiritual family called to preach salvation by demonstrating the power of God. Here you will discover who we are, why we exist, and how we work to restore destinies in the name of Jesus Christ.
conocenos.section1Text: la iglesia de Cristo encomendada a predicar salvación demostrando el poder de Dios. No somos solo un lugar de reunión: somos una casa donde la Palabra se predica y el poder de Dios se manifiesta para transformar vidas reales.
conocenos.section2Text: Vimos que muchos conocen de Dios de lejos, pero no experimentan su poder para salir de la opresión, sanar sus familias y caminar en propósito. Por eso traemos la palabra de salvación enfocada en liberación, prosperidad y el establecimiento de matrimonios conforme al diseño de Dios.
conocenos.section2Highlight: Our mission is to reveal Jesus and restore people’s destinies
conocenos.section3Text: En linea con el llamado divino de nuestro padre espritual, obramos en:
conocenos.section3Item1Text: We minister to break spiritual chains that hold back your progress.
conocenos.section3Item2Text: We teach you to walk in provision and purpose, not in lack.
conocenos.section3Item3Text: We support families and couples to restore their home according to God’s plan.
conocenos.section3Closing: All under the direction of the call of our spiritual father.
conocenos.section4Text: We are under the coverage and direction of spiritual father
conocenos.section4TextRest: Puedes conocer más de su ministerio y palabra diaria en su cuenta oficial de Facebook: Anthony Ifesinachi . Creemos en la importancia de la cobertura espiritual y la paternidad en el ministerio.
conocenos.section5Text: We do not preach theory only. We are a church where the power of God is demonstrated to heal, deliver, and restore. If you are looking for a place where faith is practical and visible, this is your place.
conocenos.section6Text: Pure Word, God’s presence first, and accompaniment. We do not leave you alone after Sunday. We help you walk the process.
conocenos.section6Item1Text: We preach the complete Bible, not half truths.
conocenos.section6Item2Text: We seek that every meeting is a real encounter, not a show.
conocenos.section6Item3Text: We do not leave you alone after Sunday. We help you walk the process.
conocenos.section7TextPart1: Sí sientes que tu vida, tu familia o tu destino necesitan un cambio, ven a conocernos.
conocenos.section7Strong: Visit us at our next service
conocenos.section7TextPart2: or connect with the word of our spiritual father Anthony Ifesinachi on Facebook.

miembro.welcomeText: We are excited that you have decided to take this step. Complete this form to officially join our Christian community and grow spiritually with us.
